title: AI数学测试解7/10难题仍被指未达标
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "Weird headline - I am not sure solving 7 out of 10 novel very hard problems meant AI "did not live up to the task," when 15 months ago LLMs couldn't do math.
But the actual study is interesting and illuminates flaws & successes of AIs in math. https://t.co/gX53ZQq7nC https://t.co/igRX4teOHe" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
Weird headline - I am not sure solving 7 out of 10 novel very hard problems meant AI "did not live up to the task," when 15 months ago LLMs couldn't do math.
But the actual study is interesting and illuminates flaws & successes of AIs in math. 1stproof.org/assets/docs/re…
nature
@Nature
17h
Artificial intelligence has undergone its most scrupulous maths test yet, and it did not live up to the task
go.nature.com/4oqlNk6
3:28 PM · Jun 15, 2026 30.2K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: AI数学测试解7/10难题仍被指未达标
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 奇怪的标题--我不确定解决10个极其困难的新问题中的7个就意味着AI"没有完成任务"，而15个月前大语言模型还不会做数学。 但实际研究很有趣，揭示了AI在数学中的缺陷与成功。https：//1stproof.org/assets/docs/report.pdf 【引用 @Nature】：人工智能经历了其最严谨的数学测试，然而它并未完成任务 https：//go.nature.com/4oqlNk6
